query: SELECT rdo.operation FROM route_draft_operations rdo WHERE rdo.route_draft_id = $1 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM route_draft_targets rdt JOIN provider_models pm ON pm.id = rdt.provider_model_id JOIN providers p ON p.id = pm.provider_id JOIN provider_revision_models prm ON prm.provider_revision_id = p.active_revision_id AND prm.source_provider_model_id = pm.id AND prm.enabled JOIN provider_revision_capabilities prc ON prc.provider_revision_model_id = prm.id AND prc.operation = rdo.operation AND prc.source = 'certified' WHERE rdt.route_draft_id = $1 AND p.state <> 'disabled'::provider_state) ORDER BY rdo.operation LIMIT 1
